scenario: GatewayRouter fails to find optimal routing after backend topology change
failure_mode: Static routing weights don't adapt to changing backend performance profiles
lesson: Physarum-inspired feedback: increase capacity weight for low-latency paths, decay high-latency paths. The route to use IS the route that gets used successfully.
counterfactual: If Physarum routing were active, weights would have converged to optimal within 50 requests automatically
implementation: Add to GatewayRouter: on each success, backend.weight *= 1.01; on each failure, backend.weight *= 0.95; renormalize.
prevention: Monitor backend weight distribution entropy — if one backend monopolizes (weight > 0.9), inject artificial exploration
